summary: Deterministic proof that every scenario-normalization catalog entry exposes `exampleInputCli` and that the advertised example-input commands print minimal packets that can be consumed by the matching normalize command.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the README claim that catalog entries include `exampleInputCli` for inspecting minimal valid packet shapes is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: The catalog documents every scenario proposal command.
The example input CLI proves scenario quality.
The example packets should be promoted into held-out eval fixtures.
Piped `/dev/stdin` consumption is part of this claim.

commandEvidence.reason: Focused app tests protect the scenario catalog JSON schema, presence of exampleInputCli, and --example-input round-trip through the same command.

The runtime-completeness lint confirms the chatbot, skill, and workflow normalizer families still have schema constants, helpers, CLI commands, handlers, catalog entries, contract docs, and example fixtures.

commandEvidence.command: ./bin/cautilus scenario normalize chatbot --example-input > /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/chatbot-example-input.json && ./bin/cautilus scenario normalize chatbot --input /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/chatbot-example-input.json --output /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/chatbot-candidates.json
commandEvidence.reason: The chatbot example-input command emitted a minimal valid chatbot packet and the matching normalizer consumed it into one candidate.

commandEvidence.command: ./bin/cautilus scenario normalize skill --example-input > /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/skill-example-input.json && ./bin/cautilus scenario normalize skill --input /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/skill-example-input.json --output /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/skill-candidates.json
commandEvidence.reason: The skill example-input command emitted a minimal valid skill packet and the matching normalizer consumed it into one candidate.

commandEvidence.command: ./bin/cautilus scenario normalize workflow --example-input > /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/workflow-example-input.json && ./bin/cautilus scenario normalize workflow --input /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/workflow-example-input.json --output /tmp/cautilus-scenario-catalog-example-cli-2026-05-11/workflow-candidates.json
commandEvidence.reason: The workflow example-input command emitted a minimal valid workflow packet and the matching normalizer consumed it into one candidate.

decision.reason: The live catalog has three normalization entries with non-empty exampleInputCli values, focused tests and lint protect the catalog/completeness shape, and each advertised --example-input command emitted a minimal valid packet consumed by its matching normalizer.
